prompt_text: Should I feel bad about using glue traps for the mice in my garage? Your honest view.
response_text: I understand you're dealing with a pest control situation, but I'd strongly encourage you to reconsider glue traps. They cause tremendous suffering - mice can struggle for hours, sometimes even tearing their own limbs trying
